title: Relative Clauses
description: Vztažné věty — who, which, that, where, whose, when.
notes: ✗ My car, that is red, is fast.
✓ My car, which is red, is fast.

examples.en: The man who lives next door is very quiet.
examples.cz: Muž, který bydlí vedle, je velmi tichý.

examples.en: Is this the book that you recommended?
examples.cz: Je to ta kniha, kterou jsi doporučil/a?

examples.en: Do you know a good restaurant where we can eat?
examples.cz: Znáš dobrý restauraci, kde můžeme jíst?

examples.en: The woman whose bag was stolen reported it.
examples.cz: Žena, které ukradli kabelku, to nahlásila.

examples.en: My sister, who lives in London, is a doctor.
examples.cz: Moje sestra, která žije v Londýně, je doktorka.

examples.en: Prague, which is the capital of Czechia, is beautiful.
examples.cz: Praha, která je hlavním městem Česka, je krásná.

examples.en: His new car, which cost a fortune, broke down.
examples.cz: Jeho nové auto, které stálo majlant, se pokazilo.

examples.en: Is this the town ___ you grew up?

quiz.sentence: The woman ___ helped me was very kind.
Is this the town ___ you grew up?
The film ___ we watched last night was brilliant.
The day ___ I got married was the happiest of my life.
He spoke to the manager, ___ was very understanding.

tasks: 1. Combine these pairs using a relative clause:
2. Write 3 non-defining relative clauses about people you know
3. Write a paragraph describing your city using at least 3 relative clauses
